calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2016 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 6
Judge Pro Tem: Karen Kwong, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Compnay is present. Represented by Monalisa Caldwell
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendants Brittany Stallings and Michael Goode are present.
Attorney Sheldon Balamn appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of December 5, 2016 is vacated. (501)
